advancedBulkhead.description: Compared to its little brother, the advanced bulkhead is slightly thicker and heavier, offering greater durability.
advancedBulkhead.name: Advanced Bulkhead

advancedDeckElements.description: Thick and durable, these 3D-printed floor tiles can be found in certain buildings and high-end spacecraft.
advancedDeckElements.name: Advanced Deck Elements

advancedEngine.description: An advanced-level STL engine with lots of thrust power and thus a relatively high fuel consumption.
advancedEngine.name: Advanced STL Engine

advancedFuelPump.description: An advanced fuel pump used in high-thrust spacecraft engines.
advancedFuelPump.name: Advanced Fuel Pump

advancedFuelRod.description: An advanced form of fuel rod that can be applied in fission reactors.
advancedFuelRod.name: Advanced Fuel Rod

advancedHeatShield.description: Surrounding a ship with these tiles will significantly reduce the damage it takes from extreme heat.
advancedHeatShield.name: Advanced Thermal Protection Tile

advancedHighgSeats.description: A set of special seats significantly increasing the maximum g-force values a ship's crew can endure.
advancedHighgSeats.name: Advanced High-G Seats

advancedHullPlate.description: An advanced spaceship hull plate. It will significantly reduce a ship's overall deterioration and allow it to endure very high maximum g-force values.
advancedHullPlate.name: Advanced Hull Plate

advancedNozzle.description: An advanced nozzle used in medium-thrust spacecraft engines.
advancedNozzle.name: Advanced Nozzle

advancedRadiationShielding.description: These plates protect a ship from taking damage from typical medium-star radiation levels.
advancedRadiationShielding.name: Advanced Anti-rad Plate

advancedStructuralElements.description: Laced with titanium, these are an even sturdier, yet much lighter version of reinforced structural elements.
advancedStructuralElements.name: Advanced Structural Elements

advancedThermalProtectionMaterial.description: A borosilicate-impregnated ceramic fabric used for thermal protection against extreme heat.
advancedThermalProtectionMaterial.name: Advanced Thermal Protection Material

advancedWhippleShielding.description: Shielding plates that significantly reduce damage from flying through systems with a high meteoroid density.
advancedWhippleShielding.name: Advanced Whipple Shielding

advancedWindow.description: Fitted with reinforced frames and nano-coated glass, these windows have very specific uses in buildings and electronics.
advancedWindow.name: Advanced Transparent Aperture

aerostatFoundation.description: This modular, hollow platform can be filled with a lifting gas to build the buoyant foundations for structures in the upper atmosphere of gas giants.
aerostatFoundation.name: Aerostat Foundation

airScrubber.description: Air processing equipment that removes pollutants that are detrimental to life.
airScrubber.name: Air Scrubber

allPurposeFodder.description: Fodder for animals of all kinds.
allPurposeFodder.name: All-Purpose Fodder

aluminium.description: Aluminium and its alloys have been a staple of the aerospace industry since its early days, and they are still being used in virtually every structural part of modern spaceships.
aluminium.name: Aluminium

aluminiumIronAlloy.description: An iron-based alloy commonly used as a budget replacement for titanium, so no miracles are to be expected.
aluminiumIronAlloy.name: Ferrominium

aluminiumOre.description: An ore that can be smelted down to pure aluminium, which in turn plays a vital role in ship construction.
aluminiumOre.name: Aluminium Ore

aluminiumTitaniumAlloy.description: Lightweight, flexible and durable, this namesake of Earth's titanium has become the de facto standard in space ship construction.
aluminiumTitaniumAlloy.name: Alpha-Stabilized Titanium

alurhenium.description: An alloy that combines the flexibility of aluminium and the resistance of rhenium.
alurhenium.name: Alurhenium

ammonia.description: A staple of modern fuel production, Ammonia could be synthesized from Nitrogen and Hydrogen. However, collecting it directly from the atmosphere has proven more cost-efficient.
ammonia.name: Ammonia

antennaArray.description: Uses a curved surface to direct signals to a focal point for collection.
antennaArray.name: Antenna Array

antibacterialTreeFlowers.description: Flowers of the plant Humulus Iupulus used in the brewing of beer and herbal medicine.
antibacterialTreeFlowers.name: Flowery Hops

argon.description: A noble gas often used as inert atmosphere in smelting, metalworking and other applications.
argon.name: Argon

artificialSoil.description: Proper soil, created in the lab.
artificialSoil.name: Artificial Soil

audioDistributionSystem.description: Distributes audio signals within a pre-defined space.
audioDistributionSystem.name: Audio Distribution System

audioTransmitter.description: Transmits audio signals between two end points.
audioTransmitter.name: Audio Transmitter

autoDoc.description: Scans the patient's body for injuries and treats them via chemical injections.
autoDoc.name: Auto-Doc

automatedCoolingSystem.description: A system monitoring and controlling heat in an FTL reactor.
automatedCoolingSystem.name: Automated Cooling System

bacteria.description: These microscopic organisms play a role in a number of processes such as fermentation and purification.
bacteria.name: Helpful Bacteria

basicAiFramework.description: A collection of basic AI algorithms as a starting point for any even remotely intelligent machine.
basicAiFramework.name: Basic AI Framework

basicBulkhead.description: Divide ships and buildings into several rooms, increase their structural rigidity and seal off fires or breached sections in case of an accident.
basicBulkhead.name: Basic Bulkhead

basicDeckElements.description: Durable plastic floor plating for both buildings and spaceships, easily printable in various shapes and sizes.
basicDeckElements.name: Basic Deck Elements

basicFuelPump.description: A standard fuel pump used in low-thrust spacecraft engines.
basicFuelPump.name: Basic Fuel Pump

basicFuelRod.description: A tube to hold the fuel required to perform FTL jumps.
basicFuelRod.name: Basic Fuel Rod

basicHeatShield.description: Surrounding a spaceship with these tiles will reduce the damage it takes from extreme heat.
basicHeatShield.name: Basic Thermal Protection Tile

basicHighgSeats.description: A set of special seats increasing the maximum g-force values a ship's crew can endure.
basicHighgSeats.name: Basic High-G Seats

basicNozzle.description: A basic nozzle used in low-thrust spacecraft engines.
basicNozzle.name: Basic Nozzle

basicRadiationShielding.description: These plates protect a ship from taking damage from typical small-star radiation levels.
basicRadiationShielding.name: Basic Anti-rad Plate

basicStructuralElements.description: General term for mid-sized structural ship and building components that are neither walls nor floors.
basicStructuralElements.name: Basic Structural Elements

basicThermalProtectionMaterial.description: A beryllium-impregnated ceramic fabric used in heat shields of all kinds.
basicThermalProtectionMaterial.name: Basic Thermal Protection Material

basicWhippleShielding.description: Shielding plates that reduce damage from flying through systems with a high meteoroid density.
basicWhippleShielding.name: Basic Whipple Shielding

basicWindow.description: Consisting of a metal frame, multiple layers of transparent plastic, and an emergency shutter in case the window gets compromised in non-breathable atmospheres or space.
basicWindow.name: Basic Transparent Aperture

beryl.description: Beryllium Aluminum cyclosilicates. The most well known forms are emerald and aquamarine.
beryl.name: Beryl Crystals

beryllium.description: Its thermal conductivity and low density make it useful for space based structures and ships. Beryllium is somewhat rare as it is fused into heavier elements inside stars.
beryllium.name: Beryllium

bioreactiveMineral.description: A set of highly versatile minerals that serve as a basis for different kinds of chemical reagents.
bioreactiveMineral.name: Bioreactive Minerals

biosphereUnit.description: A large-scale biosphere, often used to grow food and herbs for long-term space travel.
biosphereUnit.name: Biosphere Unit

bleach.description: Desaturation agent - or "bleach", as it is more commonly known - is used to eliminate the natural color, texture, and odor of raw textiles.
bleach.name: Desaturation Agent

blueGoldConnectors.description: Shielded connectors help reduce the risk of signal interference.
blueGoldConnectors.name: Shielded Connectors

bodyScanner.description: Scans human bodies, usually to detect injuries or contraband.
bodyScanner.name: Body Scanner

boronCrystals.description: Known for its resistance to heat, boron is widely applied for thermal protection purposes.
boronCrystals.name: Boron Crystals

borosilicate.description: A material highly resistant to thermal shock.
borosilicate.name: Borosilicate

breathableLiquid.description: This oxygen-rich solution prevents lungs from collapsing under high acceleration or in high-pressure environments.
breathableLiquid.name: Breathable Liquid

caffeinatedBeans.description: Coffee plants will rise up to 20 meters in height on low-gravity planets although they are generally tricky to grow, requiring heavy rain in just the right intervals.
caffeinatedBeans.name: Caffeinated Beans

calcium.description: Human bones have been subjected to a host of new challenges since the space age began, making a regular calcium intake all the more important.
calcium.name: Calcium

caliche.description: Caliche is a sedimentary rock mostly mined for its iodine, a stable halogen used in contemporary lighting technology.
caliche.name: Caliche Rock

capacitor.description: Capacitors are made up of two conductive plates that are close together but not in contact. When a voltage is applied to the two plates an electrical field is formed between them.
capacitor.name: Electric Field Capacitor

carbohydrateGrains.description: A staple of human nutrition since the neolithic revolution, grains are still a versatile ingredient in the age of space exploration.
carbohydrateGrains.name: High-Carb Grains

carbohydrateMaize.description: An essential, highly nutritional ingredient, maize is grown on farms and in greenhouse domes across the universe. Some incinerate it for its Carbon, others just want to make popcorn.
carbohydrateMaize.name: High-Carb Maize

carbon.description: Basis of all life and some industries, Carbon is used in ore purification and a variety of other processes.
carbon.name: Carbon

ceramicFabric.description: Ceramic fabrics have proven very useful when it comes to coating spaceship hulls to protect them from extreme temperatures.
ceramicFabric.name: Ceramic Fabric

ceramicTungstenFabric.description: A tungsten-infused version of ceramic fabric for those who want to go the extra mile in terms of thermal protection.
ceramicTungstenFabric.name: Ceramic-Tungsten Fabric

chemicalReagents.description: Used to create a variety of drugs and other chemically created products.
chemicalReagents.name: Chemical Reagents

chlorine.description: A chemical with many stand-out properties, chlorine has various uses in the food, clothing, and construction industries.
chlorine.name: Chlorine

climateController.description: A climate controller maintains environmental factors at a comfortable level in a ship or structure.
climateController.name: Climate Controller

combustionChamber.description: Due to the extreme temperatures reached in combustion chambers, they come with multiple layers of borosilicate coating by default.
combustionChamber.name: Combustion Chamber

commandBridge1.description: A standard command bridge ready to be implemented into pretty much any spacecraft.
commandBridge1.name: Command Bridge MK1

commandBridge2.description: An advanced command bridge applied in spaceships using more complex engines and reactors.
commandBridge2.name: Command Bridge MK2

commandBridgeShort.description: A command bridge module specifically designed for STL-only intra-system space flight.
commandBridgeShort.name: Short-distance Command Bridge

communicationSystem.description: Full communication system ready to be implemented as part of a bigger complex.
communicationSystem.name: Communication System

coolingFan.description: A fan used to actively cool equipment by moving atmospheric gases over its surfaces.
coolingFan.name: Active Cooling Device

copper.description: Its high electrical and thermal conductivity as well as its resistance to deformation and corrosion make copper a versatile ingredient in various electronic components.
copper.name: Copper

copperAluminiumAlloy.description: Among other things, this alloy of copper and aluminium has been found to considerably increase the efficiency of solar panels.
copperAluminiumAlloy.name: Bronze

copperConnectors.description: Cheap but effective copper based connectors.
copperConnectors.name: Budget Connectors

copperOre.description: This ore can be smelted down to copper, a metal that is nowadays used mostly in electronic devices.
copperOre.name: Copper Ore

coreModuleKit.description: Provides everything required to build one's first base!
coreModuleKit.name: Core Module Kit

cottonProcessed.description: A cloth made from cotton used in clothing as well as in medicine as a component of bandages.
cottonProcessed.name: Cotton Fabric

cottonRaw.description: Domed cotton fields are warm and moderately humid places, and provide the basis for all of tomorrow's fashion trends.
cottonRaw.name: Raw Cotton Fiber

crewQuarters.description: A large ready-to-go unit for a full spaceship crew to live and sleep in.
crewQuarters.name: Crew Quarters (Large)

crewQuartersMed.description: A medium-sized ready-to-go unit for a full spaceship crew to live and sleep in.
crewQuartersMed.name: Crew Quarters (Medium)

crewQuartersSmall.description: A small ready-to-go unit for a full spaceship crew to live and sleep in.
crewQuartersSmall.name: Crew Quarters (Small)

crewQuartersTiny.description: The smallest possible crew quarters. Say goodbye to luxury!
crewQuartersTiny.name: Crew Quarters (Tiny)

crowdControlDrone.description: A security drone equipped to control riots and detect contraband.
crowdControlDrone.name: Crowd Control Drone

cryoUnit.description: The cryogenic unit safely places biological specimens in, and takes them out, of cryogenic stasis.
cryoUnit.name: Cryogenic Unit

cryogenicFluid.description: This transparent, jelly-like substance is used in cryogenic tanks, mostly on generation ships. It provides nutrients via skin contact and even mitigates the effects of high acceleration.
cryogenicFluid.name: Cryogenic Stabilizer

cryopreservationUnit.description: A unit holding cryopreservation tanks for long-term space travel.
cryopreservationUnit.name: Cryopreservation Unit

dataAnalyzer.description: The data analyzer applies artificial intelligence techniques to data in order to extract insights.
dataAnalyzer.name: Data Analyzer

dataVisualizer.description: The data visualizer creates, maps, graphs, charts and other visualizations to illustrate the insights gained from data analysis.
dataVisualizer.name: Data Visualizer

decorativeElements.description: A variety of oddly shaped elements designed to serve as decorations at appropriate venues.
decorativeElements.name: Decorative Elements

distributedDatabase.description: A distributed data store. They are often used to maintain state between components of a distributed system.
distributedDatabase.name: Distributed Database

drinkingWater.description: Treated water that is safe for drinking, food preparation and other day to day human uses.
drinkingWater.name: Drinking Water

droneChassis.description: The basic chassis for any kind of drone.
droneChassis.name: Drone Chassis

droneFrame.description: Every drone chassis needs a proper holding frame.
droneFrame.name: Drone Frame

droneOperationsUnit.description: Building unit set up for controlling and monitoring drone operations.
droneOperationsUnit.name: Drone Operations Unit

einsteinium.description: A radioactive element that did not exist naturally on Earth. The high radioactivity of some Einsteinium isotopes produces a visible glow.
einsteinium.name: Einsteinium

engineerBundle.description: Everything required to supply 100 engineers for 10 days.
engineerBundle.name: Engineer Consumable Bundle

engineerClothing.description: Half clothing, half computer, this garment assists engineers in their everyday tasks.
engineerClothing.name: Smart Space Suit

engineerFood.description: This spicier version of standard-issue rations enjoys great popularity among engineers, who seem to enjoy sweating even during lunch break.
engineerFood.name: Flavoured Insta-Meal

engineerLuxuryDrink.description: Sharing a bottle of gin has become one of the most prevalent ways to unwind after a long day's work. The added Einsteinium adds a certain hallucinatory quality that is hard to say no to.
engineerLuxuryDrink.name: Einsteinium-Infused Gin

engineerLuxuryHealth.description: This paste works wonders on sore joints. VitaGel used to be a trademarked name but was soon also used for all the copies that flooded the market.
engineerLuxuryHealth.name: VitaGel

engineerTools.description: A handheld analysis tool with the ability to perform diagnostics checks and help with repairs.
engineerTools.name: Personal Data Assistant

enrichedEinsteinium.description: Einsteinium enriched in a special chemical process for use in fission reactors.
enrichedEinsteinium.name: Enriched Einsteinium

enrichedTechnetium.description: While not as radioactive as other materials, an enriched form of technetium proved very useful to, among other things, power radioisotope generators.
enrichedTechnetium.name: Enriched Technetium

entertainmentDataCore.description: Games, movies, shows, music, and everything that you dream of.
entertainmentDataCore.name: Entertainment Data Core

entertainmentUnit.description: A full unit of entertainment hardware and control devices.
entertainmentUnit.name: Entertainment Unit

epoxy.description: A highly viscous synthetic resin which, when hardened, acts as an adhesive reinforcement in building and ship components.
epoxy.name: Epoxy Resin

fastenerKitMedium.description: A medium set of standard fasteners.
fastenerKitMedium.name: Medium Fastener Kit

fastenerKitSmall.description: A small set of standard fasteners.
fastenerKitSmall.name: Small Fastener Kit

fattyNuts.description: Nuts provide important triglycerides, which are rich in energy. Make sure to always keep an eye on your blood fat and do not overindulge.
fattyNuts.name: Triglyceride Nuts

fattyVegetables.description: Similar-looking to Earth's fruits, but creamier and almost fatty-tasting, Triglyceride Fruits provide fewer health benefits, but more energy than their ancestors.
fattyVegetables.name: Triglyceride Fruits

fissionReactor.description: Performs controlled nuclear fission in a chain reaction to generate large amounts of energy.
fissionReactor.name: Fission Reactor

floatingTank.description: A person-sized tank to have a mind-expanding floating experience in.
floatingTank.name: Floating Tank

flowControl.description: This unit controls the flow of liquids in as a complex a way as its user desires.
flowControl.name: Flow Control Device

fluidPiping.description: This fluid piping system makes use of helium in its mantle to facilitate the discovery of leakage.
fluidPiping.name: Fluid Piping

fluorine.description: The lightest halogen element and extremely reactive. Fluorine has both medical and industrial applications.
fluorine.name: Fluorine

flux.description: When added to an ore refining process, this chemical allows for a more efficient separation of metals from slag, resulting in higher outputs for the same input.
flux.name: Flux

ftlFieldController.description: The FTL field controller enables FTL travel by using large amounts of energy to bend spacetime around a ship.
ftlFieldController.name: FTL Field Controller

ftlFuel.description: Used by the right drive, these small pellets emit an energy capable of warping spacetime and punching a tunnel for the ship to pass through.
ftlFuel.name: FTL Fuel

fuelSavingEngine.description: Less powerful than a standard STL engine, but saves quite a bit of fuel at the same time.
fuelSavingEngine.name: Fuel-saving STL Engine

fullBodyInteractionDevice.description: Essentially a high-tech overall that allows its wearer to control all kinds of software via gestures and movement.
fullBodyInteractionDevice.name: Full-Body Interaction Device

galerite.description: Although nowhere to be found in the Solar System, Galerite has brought upon a revolution in STL fuel technology shortly after its discovery in humanity's new home systems.
galerite.name: Galerite Rock

gasContainer.description: Due to its shape and material, this gas tank can hold substances far above atmospheric pressure.
gasContainer.name: Cylindrical Gas Container

gatewaySegment.description: Several gateway segments are used to form the well-known ring structure of a gateway.
gatewaySegment.name: Gateway Segment

glassCombustionChamber.description: As it turns out, reinforced glass can withstand quite a bit of heat.
glassCombustionChamber.name: Glass Combustion Chamber

glassEngine.description: It was quite the feat when they discovered how to make a glass-based engine. It's not very powerful, but an affordable alternative!
glassEngine.name: Glass-based STL Engine

glassNozzle.description: Requires extremely careful handling, but works surprisingly well.
glassNozzle.name: Glass Nozzle

gold.description: Though it is still not an abundant resource, humanity has taken on a more pragmatic view of gold over the centuries, appreciating its conductivity more than its appearance.
gold.name: Gold

goldCopperAlloy.description: This alloy combines the excellent conductivity of both gold and copper.
goldCopperAlloy.name: Red Gold

goldIronAlloy.description: An alloy of gold with Gallium or Indium.
goldIronAlloy.name: Blue Gold

goldOre.description: Ever since the 20th century, hydraulic mining has been the prevalent method of recovering gold nuggets from open pits and mine shafts.
goldOre.name: Gold Ore

grapes.description: Even though grapes have become rare in the space age, they will not die out as long as there is demand for decent wine in the universe.
grapes.name: Wine-Quality Grapes

habitatUnit.description: An artificial, yet natural living space.
habitatUnit.name: Habitat Unit

habitationModule.description: A module supporting long-term habitation on a colony ship.
habitationModule.name: Habitation Module

halite.description: The natural form of rock salt, these crystals are both pretty to look at and taste good when ingested.
halite.name: Halite Crystals

handcraftWorkshopUnit.description: Hand-made art has become quite rare. This is where it comes to life.
handcraftWorkshopUnit.name: Handcraft Workshop Unit

hardenedHullPlate.description: A hardened spaceship hull plate. It will reduce a ship's overall deterioration and allow it to endure significantly higher maximum g-force values.
hardenedHullPlate.name: Hardened Hull Plate

hardenedStructuralElements.description: General term for metal components for ships and buildings, such as girders and beams.
hardenedStructuralElements.name: Hardened Structural Elements

heliotropeExtract.description: In high-enough concentrations, substances extracted from heliotropes were found to have a sedating effect on the human body as a whole, thereby expanding the range of endurable g-force values.
heliotropeExtract.name: Heliotrope Extract

helium.description: A protective gas in welding processes and still the most common solution to make your voice sound funny.
helium.name: Helium

helium3.description: Most commonly found on surfaces exposed to cosmic rays, helium-3 is a key component of faster-than-light fuel.
helium3.name: Helium-3 Isotope

herbs.description: Spices are herbs low in nutritional value, but provide some health benefits. As a result, they are not a given in every ship's cafeteria, but some can be found in the med bay.
herbs.name: Spicy Herbs

highLoadCargoBay.description: Everything you need to build a high-load cargo bay. It can only hold materials relatively small in volume though.
highLoadCargoBay.name: High-load Cargo Bay Kit

highPowerReactor.description: A high-power FTL reactor that takes a relatively long time to fully charge up.
highPowerReactor.name: High-power FTL Reactor

highVolumeCargoBay.description: Everything you need to build a high-volume cargo bay. It can only hold relatively lightweight materials though.
highVolumeCargoBay.name: High-volume Cargo Bay Kit

holographicDisplay.description: The holographic display creates a three dimensional image of an object that can be seen with the naked eye.
holographicDisplay.name: Holographic Display

holographicGlasses.description: High-tech glasses able to display all kinds of additional information and lifelike visuals.
holographicGlasses.name: Holographic Glasses

hugeCargoBay.description: Used to install the most massive of cargo bays for all your transportation needs.
hugeCargoBay.name: Huge Cargo Bay Kit

hydrocarbonPlants.description: Hydrocarbon plants come in many shapes and sizes, but most of them nowadays are algae grown in massive basins for a large variety of purposes.
hydrocarbonPlants.name: Hydrocarbon Plants

hydrogen.description: Number one on the periodic table, hydrogen is a vital ingredient in various chemical compounds including ship fuel.
hydrogen.name: Hydrogen

hyperPowerReactor.description: An extremely high-power FTL reactor. Its charge-up speed had to be reduced significantly to guarantee stable results.
hyperPowerReactor.name: Hyper-power Reactor

hyperthrustEngine.description: This STL engine reaches extremely high thrust powers, but also burns a lot of fuel in the process.
hyperthrustEngine.name: Hyperthrust STL Engine

hyperthrustNozzle.description: A special nozzle used in high-thrust spacecraft engines.
hyperthrustNozzle.name: Hyperthrust Nozzle

indigo.description: When you absolutely, positively got to color it indigo.
indigo.name: Indigo Colorant

informationDataCore.description: A whole library in one small data core.
informationDataCore.name: Information Data Core

informationManagementSystem.description: A system supporting its user in analyzing and interpreting large sets of data.
informationManagementSystem.name: Information Management System

insuFoam.description: This construction foam is used to insulate buildings against the cold of planets with non-habitable mean temperatures below -25°C.
insuFoam.name: InsuFoam

iodine.description: This stable halogen is extracted from Caliche rock and used in certain lamps that cannot be replaced by LED technology.
iodine.name: Iodine

iron.description: One of the most abundant elements on rocky planets, iron is used in a variety of alloys as well as the construction of buildings and metal parts.
iron.name: Iron

ironOre.description: Iron ore contains iron, one of the earliest metals to be smelted down by humanity, all the way back in 2000 BC.
ironOre.name: Iron Ore

ironTitaniumAlloy.description: An iron titanium alloy that can be used to influence grain sizes in steel making.
ironTitaniumAlloy.name: Ferro-Titanium

kevlar.description: Often spun into ropes or fabric, these fibers are used as a composite material reinforcing anything from clothing to structural building elements.
kevlar.name: Para Aramid

krypton.description: Originally mostly used for lighting and laser systems, the discovery of the gateway technology revealed that this noble gas proved useful in the stabilization of gateway singularity vortices.
krypton.name: Krypton

kryptonium.description: A compound of krypton and einsteinium originally created for the purpose of fueling singularity gateways as a newly discovered way of ship travel.
kryptonium.name: Kryptonium

laboratoryUnit.description: A ready-to-go lab that can be used as part of a larger building complex.
laboratoryUnit.name: Laboratory Unit

largeCapacitorBank.description: Stores a large amount of energy.
largeCapacitorBank.name: Large Capacitor Bank

largeCargoBay.description: Everything you need to build a large cargo bay.
largeCargoBay.name: Large Cargo Bay Kit

largeDeviceCover.description: A 3D-printed, plastic-based cover for various large electronic devices.
largeDeviceCover.name: Durable Casing L

largeEmitter.description: A large FTL emitter requiring a relatively high amount of power to create an FTL field spanning a large volume.
largeEmitter.name: Large FTL Emitter

largeFtlTank.description: Everything you need to build a large FTL fuel tank.
largeFtlTank.name: Large FTL Fuel Tank Kit

largeShipRepairDroneUnit.description: A control unit for a large set of drones able to consistently repair any kind of damage a ship takes during space flight.
largeShipRepairDroneUnit.name: Large Ship-Repair Drone Operations Unit

largeStlTank.description: Everything you need to build a large STL fuel tank.
largeStlTank.name: Large STL Fuel Tank Kit

laserDiode.description: Laser diodes directly convert electrical energy into light.
laserDiode.name: Laser Diodes

lifeSupportSystem.description: Life support systems monitor and control the atmosphere and other environmental conditions essential to life.
lifeSupportSystem.name: Life Support System

lightweightBulkhead.description: Slightly thinner, but considerably lighter wall elements offering little structural stability.
lightweightBulkhead.name: Lightweight Bulkhead

lightweightDeckElements.description: Thin but long-lived plastic floor elements available in all shapes and sizes.
lightweightDeckElements.name: Lightweight Deck Elements

lightweightHullPlate.description: A lightweight spaceship hull plate. It will help reduce a ship's mass, but is slightly more prone to deterioration.
lightweightHullPlate.name: Lightweight Hull Plate

lightweightStructuralElements.description: Various lightweight components used in ship and building construction. Can be upgraded to be more durable, but also heavier.
lightweightStructuralElements.name: Lightweight Structural Elements

lightweightWindow.description: Primarily meant to be used on the inside of structures, these double-layered windows find a great variety of applications both on planets and ships.
lightweightWindow.name: Lightweight Transparent Aperture

limestone.description: This Calcium-rich mineral can be found both in the crust and on the surface of many rocky planets. Its uses include construction and nutrition.
limestone.name: Limestone

liquidCrystals.description: These crystals are used in the manufacturing of Liquid Crystal Displays, or LCDs for short.
liquidCrystals.name: Liquid Crystals

liquidEinsteinium.description: Einstenium processed into liquid form. Still radioactive. Still glowing.
liquidEinsteinium.name: Liquid Einsteinium

lithium.description: Commonly used for the production of batteries and pharmaceuticals.
lithium.name: Lithium

lithiumOre.description: Lithium ore is required to produce lithium.
lithiumOre.name: Lithium Ore

logisticsSystem.description: A system to help with inventory management, transactions and the likes.
logisticsSystem.name: Logistics System

lowHeatFuelPump.description: An affordable fuel pump. Should not be used as part of high-temperature engines.
lowHeatFuelPump.name: Low-heat Fuel Pump

machineLearningInterface.description: The first step in creating a self-learning artificial intelligence.
machineLearningInterface.name: Machine Learning Interface

magnesium.description: One of the most abundant elements in the universe. Magnesium has many applications including as a structural material, in aluminium alloys and for the purification of solvents.
magnesium.name: Magnesium

magneticFloor.description: Magnetic ground cover allows you to establish a firm foundation in low gravity environments.
magneticFloor.name: Magnetic Ground Cover

magnetite.description: A iron oxide and common iron ore. Magnetite is ferromagnetic and can be magnetized.
magnetite.name: Magnetite

mainFrameBlank.description: The 'main frame' held the central processing and main memory of early computers. Today's mainframes are large centralized computing facilities often used for critical applications.
mainFrameBlank.name: Basic Mainframe

meat.description: The days of industrial livestock farming have long gone by, and the term "meat" has since taken on another meaning merely pertaining to a meal's texture and taste.
meat.name: Meat Tissue Patties

medicalStretcher.description: The most basic form of a mobile medical bed.
medicalStretcher.name: Medical Stretcher

mediumCapacitorBank.description: Stores a medium amount of energy.
mediumCapacitorBank.name: Medium Capacitor Bank

mediumCargoBay.description: Everything you need to build a medium-sized cargo bay.
mediumCargoBay.name: Medium Cargo Bay Kit

mediumDeviceCover.description: A 3D-printed, plastic-based cover for various medium electronic devices.
mediumDeviceCover.name: Durable Casing M

mediumEmitter.description: A medium-size FTL emitter requiring a moderate amount of power to create an FTL field spanning a mid-sized volume.
mediumEmitter.name: Medium FTL Emitter

mediumFtlTank.description: Everything you need to build a medium-sized FTL fuel tank.
mediumFtlTank.name: Medium FTL Fuel Tank Kit

mediumStlTank.description: Everything you need to build a medium-size STL fuel tank.
mediumStlTank.name: Medium STL Fuel Tank Kit

megaTubeCoating.description: What makes a megatube? Carbon nanotubes with diameters so large they are measured in micrometers.
megaTubeCoating.name: MegaTube Coating

memoryBank.description: Provides other electronic components with lightning-fast application memory.
memoryBank.name: Memory Bank

metalHalideLamp.description: These lamps have become a staple of hydroponics, allowing certain plants (especially algae) to grow without sunlight.
metalHalideLamp.name: Metal-Halide Lighting System

microHeadphones.description: Very tiny speakers. Be careful not to lose them in your ears!
microHeadphones.name: Micro Headphones

microProcessor.description: A central processing unit implemented on a single integrated circuit.
microProcessor.name: Micro-Processor

mineralConstructionGranulate.description: Melted down, molded and then cooled off, these tiny pellets provide the hardened foundation of all buildings on rocky planets.
mineralConstructionGranulate.name: Mineral Construction Granulate

motherBoard.description: The main printed circuit board for a general purpose computer.
motherBoard.name: Motherboard

mushrooms.description: The Agaricaceae rubicatii family of fungi is not just known for unusual cultivation methods, but also rapid growth.
mushrooms.name: Protein-Rich Mushrooms

nanoCarbonSheeting.description: A substrate is covered with carbon nanotubes then the nanotubes are covered by a layer of aerogel. The aerogel is pulled away taking the nanotubes with it to form a sheeting.
nanoCarbonSheeting.name: Nano-Carbon Sheeting

nanoFiber.description: Fibers with diameters in the nanometer size range. In this case silicon fibers with graphene coating.
nanoFiber.name: Nano Fiber

nanoGlass.description: Glass with coatings of nanomaterials to give it hydrophobic, oleophobic and other properties.
nanoGlass.name: Nano-Coated Glass

nanoResin.description: A nanoparticle enhanced resin for industrial applications.
nanoResin.name: Nano-Enhanced Resin

navigation1.description: A basic navigation module to control ships with simple engines.
navigation1.name: Navigation Module MK1

navigation2.description: An advanced navigation module to control ships with complex engines.
navigation2.name: Navigation Module MK2

neon.description: A colorless odorless noble gas. Neon produces a reddish orange glow when placed in an electric field.
neon.name: Neon

neonLightingSystem.description: Neon lights remind us of a world less complicated. They're also fun!
neonLightingSystem.name: Neon Lighting System

neuralNetwork.description: Allows for artificial learning on large sets of data by vaguely simulating how actual brain neurons work.
neuralNetwork.name: Neural Network

nitrogen.description: Traded as a gas or a liquid, Nitrogen forms a great variety of compounds and plays a role in food preservation.
nitrogen.name: Nitrogen

nonVolatileMemory.description: Computer memory that can retrieve information after being powered on and off.
nonVolatileMemory.name: Non-Volatile Memory

nutrientSolution.description: While nutrient solution should not be consumed on its own due to its high concentration, it is used in a great many recipes for both edible and inedible end products.
nutrientSolution.name: Nutrient Solution

nylon.description: A versatile, plastic-based fabric traditionally used in clothing and warfare, which now also plays a role in building construction.
nylon.name: Nylon Fabric

officeSupplies.description: No one knows exactly what they are, but yet they are constantly consumed for “work”.
officeSupplies.name: Office Supplies

operatingSystem.description: Software that provides common services and interfaces to a computer system's hardware resources for other applications.
operatingSystem.name: Operating System

oxygen.description: From alloy production to our own lungs, oxygen is what keeps humanity going. Warning: Higher concentrations only breathable in low gravity environments.
oxygen.name: Oxygen

painkillers.description: The most popular medical drug in the universe.
painkillers.name: Painkillers

pesticides.description: Although toxic to small organisms, this pesticide is safe for human consumption in moderate doses.
pesticides.name: DDT Plant Agent

pineberries.description: Looks like a white strawberry, tastes like pineapple, is highly nutritious!
pineberries.name: Pineberries

pioneerBundle.description: Everything required to supply 100 pioneers for 10 days.
pioneerBundle.name: Pioneer Consumable Bundle

pioneerClothing.description: This full-body suit, usually worn as an extra layer on top of personal clothing, is certainly nothing fancy, but practical and durable.
pioneerClothing.name: Basic Overalls

pioneerLuxuryClothing.description: This garment may not look like much, but its added plastic pads prevent countless injuries across the universe day after day.
pioneerLuxuryClothing.name: Padded Work Overall

pioneerLuxuryDrink.description: Some take their psychoactive drugs with soy milk, others prefer them pure.
pioneerLuxuryDrink.name: Caffeinated Infusion

polarityFieldGenerator.description: Combines the specific functionalities of several reactor types to span large fields of barely stable polarity.
polarityFieldGenerator.name: Polarity Field Generator

polyEthylene.description: The most commonly used plastic for the past few centuries, PE still plays a vital role in packaging, clothing, printed building parts, and electronics.
polyEthylene.name: Poly-Ethylene

polymerGranulate.description: Whoever thinks they can be anything when they grow up hasn't seen polymer granulate, a supplier of plastic in virtually every industrial branch out there.
polymerGranulate.name: Polymer Granulate

premiumFertilizer.description: Surprisingly effective at generating a seemingly natural flora.
premiumFertilizer.name: Premium Fertilizer

pressureShielding.description: Shielding to protect crew and cargo from high pressure environments.
pressureShielding.name: Pressure Shielding

printedCircuitBoard.description: A sheet of non-conductive substrate covered with a layer of conductor which electronic circuits are etched onto.
printedCircuitBoard.name: Printed Circuit Board

proteinAlgae.description: Humanity needed an efficient source of protein and came up with this strain of algae. What's more, it can even grow in space.
proteinAlgae.name: Protein-Rich Algae

proteinBeans.description: While still inefficient in hydroponics, beans are a staple of planet-side farming and essential provider of protein across the universe.
proteinBeans.name: Protein-Rich Beans

proteinPaste.description: A goop of ground plants, this paste is an essential ingredient in modern "meat". Not at all enjoyable on its own.
proteinPaste.name: Protein Paste

quickChargeReactor.description: A moderate-power reactor able to charge up very quickly.
quickChargeReactor.name: Quick-charge FTL Reactor

radiationShielding.description: Shielding to protect crew and cargo from radiation environments.
radiationShielding.name: Radiation Shielding

radioDevice.description: When your regular mobile phone just isn't enough!
radioDevice.name: Radio Device

radioisotopeGenerator.description: Converts the heat from radioactive decay into a medium amount of energy.
radioisotopeGenerator.name: Radioisotope Generator

rations.description: As the most common menu item in the universe, this plant-based and often brick-shaped meal has high nutritional value to make up for the lack of flavor and spices.
rations.name: Basic Rations

reactorControlSystem.description: Monitors a variety of performance factors of an FTL reactor and automatically makes adjustments where necessary.
reactorControlSystem.name: Reactor Control System

redGoldConnectors.description: High throughput connectors for specialized applications.
redGoldConnectors.name: High-Capacity Connectors

reinforcedBulkhead.description: A wall element offering greater durability due to the addition of titanium and hardened epoxy resin.
reinforcedBulkhead.name: Reinforced Bulkhead

reinforcedDeckElements.description: Considerably heavier than the basic and advanced versions, these floor tiles are required in some large spacecraft and planetary structures.
reinforcedDeckElements.name: Reinforced Deck Elements

reinforcedHullPlate.description: A reinforced spaceship hull plate. It will slightly reduce a ship's overall deterioration and allow it to endure higher maximum g-force values.
reinforcedHullPlate.name: Reinforced Hull Plate

reinforcedStructuralElements.description: Laced with steel and resin, these components are used in buildings and spacecraft with increased requirements on structural integrity.
reinforcedStructuralElements.name: Reinforced Structural Elements

reinforcedTranslucentMaterial.description: This hybrid of old-fashioned glass and its plastic-based counterpart can be used for windows and screens alike.
reinforcedTranslucentMaterial.name: Reinforced Glass

reinforcedWindow.description: Much thicker and sturdier due to the mixture of silicon- and plastic-based glass, these windows can be built to larger dimensions while still being able to withstand huge forces.
reinforcedWindow.name: Reinforced Transparent Aperture

rescueDrone.description: A drone designed to locate and rescue living beings. Yes, it can actually carry a person.
rescueDrone.name: Rescue Drone

rhenium.description: A rare and heat-resistant metal named after the old-Earth river Rhine.
rhenium.name: Rhenium

rheniumOre.description: One of the rarest ores to be found throughout the known universe.
rheniumOre.name: Rhenium Ore

scientistBundle.description: Everything required to supply 100 scientists for 10 days.
scientistBundle.name: Scientist Consumable Bundle

scientistClothing.description: This coat comes with its own holographic display to assists its wearer throughout complex procedures, and even performs life-sustaining measures if an experiment goes awry.
scientistClothing.name: AI-Assisted Lab Coat

scientistFood.description: Even high-quality foods nowadays do not vary much in ingredients, but at least they are presented in different shapes and sizes.
scientistFood.name: Quality Meat Meal

scientistLuxuryDrink.description: Ever since ancient Greece, great minds have relied on this liquid to think. In the space-age they even apply artificial intelligence to create this unique flavor.
scientistLuxuryDrink.name: Smart Zinfandel

scientistLuxuryHealth.description: Just a little something to perk you up.
scientistLuxuryHealth.name: NeuroStimulants

scientistTools.description: A versatile computer for various purposes, but mostly used in scientific contexts.
scientistTools.name: Scientific Work Station

sealant.description: Liquid polymer providing good adherence to many common materials and flexibility when cured. May not be suitable for use on some plastics.
sealant.name: Poly-Sulfite Sealant

searchAlgorithm.description: An algorithm for searching through data.
searchAlgorithm.name: Search Algorithm

sedativeSubstance.description: A substance directly infused into the human body via special high-g seats. It helps endure particularly high g-force levels.
sedativeSubstance.name: Sedative Substance

sensor.description: A device that measures physical properties such as a thermistor for temperature measurements or a charge coupled device for measuring light levels.
sensor.name: Sensor

sensorArray.description: A full suite of active and passive remote sensing systems.
sensorArray.name: Sensor Array

settlerBundle.description: Everything required to supply 100 settlers for 10 days.
settlerBundle.name: Settler Consumable Bundle

settlerClothing.description: Equipping its wearer with superhuman strength, this suit has become a staple of physical work regardless of local gravity.
settlerClothing.name: Exoskeleton Work Suit

settlerLuxuryDrink.description: While Kombucha is not a necessity for survival, it provides a considerable boost to health and morale.
settlerLuxuryDrink.name: Kombucha

settlerLuxuryTools.description: Tools that repair things. What's not to understand? Get back to work.
settlerLuxuryTools.name: Repair Kit

settlerTools.description: These whirring, blinking, and noisy companions of modern settlers have come a long way since the first sharpened rock back on Earth.
settlerTools.name: Power Tools

shipRepairDrone.description: A drone set up to autonomously perform basic repair and maintenance tasks on all kinds of spaceships.
shipRepairDrone.name: Ship-Repair Drone

shockwaveDampeningModule.description: Controls a set of stabilizing structures to ensure even large-scale shockwaves will not result in negative impacts.
shockwaveDampeningModule.name: Shockwave-dampening Module

silicon.description: A hard and brittle crystalline solid that is often used for its properties as a semiconductor. Most often found in various forms of silicon dioxide (silica) or silicate minerals.
silicon.name: Silicon

siliconOre.description: On the markets, the term "Silicon Ore" is used as a shorthand for different products yielding silicone when smelted down, such as quartzite or sand.
siliconOre.name: Silicon Ore

silkProcessed.description: One of the few remaining fibers with a natural origin, silk nowadays has some niche uses in the clothing industry.
silkProcessed.name: Silken Fabric

silkRaw.description: The start of a long journey to sophisticated clothing such as AI-assisted lab coats.
silkRaw.name: Raw Silk Strains

singularityStabilizer.description: After the first experiments with making use of singularities, scientists quickly discovered the need for specialized stabilization modules. They do not like to talk about how they found out in too much detail though.
singularityStabilizer.name: Singularity Stabilizer

smallCapacitorBank.description: Stores a small amount of energy.
smallCapacitorBank.name: Small Capacitor Bank

smallCargoBay.description: Everything you need to build a small cargo bay.
smallCargoBay.name: Small Cargo Bay Kit

smallDeviceCover.description: A 3D-printed, plastic-based cover for various small electronic devices.
smallDeviceCover.name: Durable Casing S

smallEmitter.description: A small FTL emitter requiring relatively little power to create an FTL field spanning a small volume.
smallEmitter.name: Small FTL Emitter

smallFtlTank.description: Everything you need to build a small FTL fuel tank.
smallFtlTank.name: Small FTL Fuel Tank Kit

smallShipRepairDroneUnit.description: A control unit for a small set of drones able to consistently repair any kind of damage a ship takes during space flight.
smallShipRepairDroneUnit.name: Small Ship-Repair Drone Operations Unit

smallStlTank.description: Everything you need to build a small STL fuel tank.
smallStlTank.name: Small STL Fuel Tank Kit

sodium.description: An essential element in human biology and industry.
sodium.name: Sodium

sodiumBorohydride.description: A versatile chemical agent that chemists rely upon to get the job done. Known to be extremely flammable if left unchecked, it’s best to store it in a safe location. Mass production of this compound originated on old Earth and was first achieved by chemists from Gladi Research Group, Lab 0-99.
sodiumBorohydride.name: Sodium Borohydride

solarCell.description: A single solar cell to turn sunlight into energy.
solarCell.name: Solar Cell

solarPanel.description: High-efficiency solar panels have become the most prevalent means of energy extraction in space and on sunnier planets.
solarPanel.name: Solar Panel

spaceTether.description: A set of sturdy interwoven cords used to hold large space structures in place.
spaceTether.name: Space Tether

specializedRadiationShielding.description: These plates protect a ship from taking damage from typical large-star radiation levels.
specializedRadiationShielding.name: Specialized Anti-rad Plate

stabilitySupportSystem.description: A system that helps pilot safely through extremely high- or low-gravity atmospheres.
stabilitySupportSystem.name: Stability Support System

standardEngine.description: Standard STL engine with decent thrust and manageable fuel consumption.
standardEngine.name: Standard STL Engine

steel.description: An iron-based alloy with high tensile strength, steel is considered too heavy for most uses in space, but remains the ideal solution for many planetary construction components.
steel.name: Steel

stlFuel.description: While this liquid still resembles fuel of past centuries in smell and viscosity, today's formula is required in much smaller amounts due to vastly more efficient drives.
stlFuel.name: STL Fuel

structuralSpacecraftComponent.description: Spacecrafts consists of many different parts held together by structural components.
structuralSpacecraftComponent.name: Structural Spacecraft Component

sulfur.description: Elemental sulfur is bright yellow and solid at room temperature.
sulfur.name: Sulfur

sulfurCrystals.description: Sulfur is typically found in sulfide and sulfate minerals in nature.
sulfurCrystals.name: Sulfur Crystals

surgeryUnit.description: A building-ready medical unit to perform surgical procedures in.
surgeryUnit.name: Surgery Unit

surgicalDrone.description: A drone designed to support a surgeon at work. Once you get used to the buzzing, it's very helpful!
surgicalDrone.name: Surgical Drone

surgicalEquipment.description: All kinds of scalpels, clips and swabs.
surgicalEquipment.name: Surgical Equipment

surveillanceDrone.description: A drone designed to observe, scan and report. Most people don't like them.
surveillanceDrone.name: Surveillance Drone

tantalite.description: Rich in the element tantalum the mineral tantalite is similar to the mineral columbite and the two are commonly referred to as coltan. Tantalum is used in tantalum capacitors and coltan is also an important source of niobium.
tantalite.name: Tantalite Rock

tantalum.description: A rare and high corrosion resistant metal.
tantalum.name: Tantalum

tclAcid.description: Terephthaloyl chloride is one of the components necessary in the production of para aramid.
tclAcid.name: TCL Acid

technetium.description: All isotopes of Technetium are radioactive and it is typically found naturally only as a decay product of other elements such as Uranium and Thorium.
technetium.name: Technetium

technetiumStabilizers.description: The Technetium isotope Technetium-97 can be used as a stabilized form of Technetium is put into a fully ionized state.
technetiumStabilizers.name: Stabilized Technetium

technicianBundle.description: Everything required to supply 100 technicians for 10 days.
technicianBundle.name: Technician Consumable Bundle

technicianClothing.description: With its near impervious fabric and the air tank installed on its back, this suit allows for work with hazardous materials and in hostile environments.
technicianClothing.name: HazMat Work Suit

technicianHealth.description: Mostly intended to help with injuries, this kit contains a handheld scanner and self-expanding medical foam alongside the usual first aid equipment.
technicianHealth.name: Basic Medical Kit

technicianLuxuryDrink.description: A light beer brewed from water, hop, and malt. Some claim that it can't hold a candle to its terrestrial ancestors.
technicianLuxuryDrink.name: Stellar Pale Ale

technicianLuxuryHealth.description: Aging was considered an irreversible process. In the future that no longer rings true.
technicianLuxuryHealth.name: Stem Cell Treatment

technicianTools.description: A powerful and essential tool able to run diagnostics and find faults in a great variety of machines.
technicianTools.name: Multi-Purpose Scanner

technoKevlar.description: Technetium-enhanced para-aramid fabric for specialized applications.
technoKevlar.name: Enhanced Para Aramid

tectosilisite.description: Tectosilisite is a very silicon-rich regolith found on planets with a thin or no atmosphere at all. Its rather high He-3 contents make it interesting for fuel production.
tectosilisite.name: Tectosilisite

tensionReliefStructure.description: Often used as the central element of space infrastructure to ensure it endures the strains of meteorite impacts and pressure changes.
tensionReliefStructure.name: Tension Relief Structure

tensorProcessingUnit.description: An electronic system specifically designed to quickly process tensors for neural networks and other applications.
tensorProcessingUnit.name: Tensor Processing Unit

testTubes.description: A popular piece of laboratory equipment used to hold test samples.
testTubes.name: Test Tubes

thermalShielding.description: These actively cooled, heat-deflecting modules must be distributed along the outer walls of buildings located on planets with an average temperature of more than 75° C.
thermalShielding.name: Thermal Shielding

thermoFluid.description: This high-performance heat transfer fluid can be used from small scale applications like CPU coolers up to building-sized thermal shields.
thermoFluid.name: ThermoFluid

tinyCargoBay.description: Everything you need to build a tiny cargo bay.
tinyCargoBay.name: Tiny Cargo Bay Kit

titanium.description: Lightweight, strong, and resistant to corrosion, titanium and its alloys have become a staple (not only) of the aerospace industry.
titanium.name: Titanium

titaniumOre.description: Titanium oxide minerals rutile and ilmenite are the most common minerals in titanium ore bodies.
titaniumOre.name: Titanium Ore

torusSegment.description: Part of a circular structure made to endure long-term existence in space.
torusSegment.name: Torus Segment

touchDeviceBlank.description: Data and computing power right in the palm of your hand.
touchDeviceBlank.name: Handheld Personal Console

touchScreen.description: An input device typically deployed on top of an electronic display. More commonly known as a touch screen.
touchScreen.name: Capacitive Display

transistor.description: A transistor amplifies or switches electrical signals and power. This is an advanced model.
transistor.name: Advanced Transistor

translucentMaterial.description: This traditional form of glass is rarely used on its own nowadays, but rather combined with new materials to withstand the stress and strain of the space age.
translucentMaterial.name: Glass

traumaCareUnit.description: Had an accident? This is where you'll be taken care of.
traumaCareUnit.name: Trauma Care Unit

truss.description: A stable relationship between structural components is built on truss.
truss.name: Truss

tungstenAluminiumAlloy.description: Able to endure extreme heat, this alloy is typically used for thermal protection purposes for spaceships or high-thrust engines.
tungstenAluminiumAlloy.name: Alpha-Stabilized Tungsten

tungstenResource.description: Tungsten can be recovered from scrap by using microorganisms to absorb it enabling recovery. This process sometimes occurs naturally when microorganisms come in contact with tungsten bearing minerals.
tungstenResource.name: Bacterial Tungsten Solution

twoDimensionalDisplay.description: An output device that displays data.
twoDimensionalDisplay.name: Information Display

universalToolset.description: A collection of high-quality tools to fix everyday appliances or to hone your handcrafting skills.
universalToolset.name: Universal Toolset

universeMap.description: A map of the known universe and all its related data.
universeMap.name: Spatial Navigation Map

verySmallCargoBay.description: Everything you need to build a very small cargo bay.
verySmallCargoBay.name: Very Small Cargo Bay Kit

vortexEngine.description: A ship engine incorporating a vortex reactor to enable colony ship travel independently from established FTL connections.
vortexEngine.name: Vortex Engine

vortexFuelTank.description: A giant tank able to hold enough vortex fuel on a colony ships to journey to a nearby sector and back.
vortexFuelTank.name: Vortex Fuel Tank

vortexReactor.description: A special reactor for colony ships making use of certain aspects of gateway travel technology.
vortexReactor.name: Vortex Reactor

vortexStimulationFuel.description: The addition of einsteinium proved to be the final puzzle piece in finding a way of taming the singularity vortex which was once believed to be uncontrollable.
vortexStimulationFuel.name: Vortex Fuel

waferMedium.description: A medium sized disk of crystalline silicon used in the fabrication of electronics.
waferMedium.name: Medium Wafer

waferSmall.description: A small sized disk of crystalline silicon used in the fabrication of electronics.
waferSmall.name: Small Wafer

water.description: It should be no surprise that the liquid making up 60 % of our bodies is used in almost all processes concerning the production of nourishment across the universe.
water.name: Water

waterFilter.description: Water filtration equipment that actively monitors water conditions and applied remediation as needed.
waterFilter.name: Active Water Filter

waterRecycler.description: Equipment for the reclaiming usable clean water from biological wastes and industrial effluents.
waterRecycler.name: Water Reclaimer

weakArtificalIntelligence.description: AI optimized for a specific task or application. Definitely not a general purpose AI that will learn at an alarming rate, become self aware and create problems for humanity.
weakArtificalIntelligence.name: Weak Artificial Intelligence

wolfram.description: A rare metal with the highest melting point of all the known elements. Also known as Wolfram.
wolfram.name: Tungsten

wolfrhenium.description: Turns out combining two metals with extremely high melting points results in a useful alloy, especially when it comes to building resilient space infrastructure.
wolfrhenium.name: Wolfrhenium

zircon.description: The mineral Zircon can be processed into metallic zirconium.
zircon.name: Zircon Crystals

zirconium.description: Zirconium has many applications including in nuclear reactors as cladding for fuel rods and as corrosion resistant material in chemical processing equipment.
zirconium.name: Zirconium

Reactor.advancedAppliancesFactory_description: Produces advanced appliances, often used in space ships and space stations.
Reactor.advancedMaterialLab_description: Refines intermediate rare materials into more usable forms.
Reactor.advancedSmelter_description: Allows for the creation of high-performance metal alloys.
Reactor.appliancesFactory_description: Produces large appliances, often used in space ships and space stations.
Reactor.basicMaterialsPlant_description: Produces a host of materials and end products needed to bootstrap a colony.
Reactor.chemPlant_description: Produces various chemical compounds and immediate products.
Reactor.cleanRoom_description: Produces integrated circuits and basic computer parts.
Reactor.clothingFactory_description: Manufactures textiles from different fibers, used in clothing and even ship construction.
Reactor.coreModule_description: The basic module and life support necessary to start a new base on a planet.
Reactor.corporationProjectHeadquarters_descripti: The physical headquarter of any corporation, running basic administrative functions.
Reactor.corporationProjectRepresentationCenter_d: The APEX representation center allows corporations to donate some of their profits to the APEX foundation. The foundation uses the money to supply new and upcoming CEOs with the necessary capital and ships to start their entrepreneurial journey. Having a high representation level is widely recognized as a testimony of wealth and success.
Reactor.droneShop_description: The place where all things drones are put together.
Reactor.einsteiniumEnrichmentPlant_description: Specialized plant that turns Liquid Einsteinium into its more usable, stabilized form.
Reactor.electronicDeviceManufactory_description: Manufactures a variety of small end-user-ready devices.
Reactor.electronicsPlant_description: Uses basic computer parts to manufacture larger computers and control units.
Reactor.energyComponentAssembly_description: Creates energy supply systems and devices of all kinds.
Reactor.extractor_description: Extracts ores and minerals from the surface.
Reactor.farm_description: Produces agricultural products like grains and soy. Needs fertile soil.
Reactor.fermentationFacility_description: Creates those beverages that make life in space just a little bit more bearable.
Reactor.fineSmithy_description: Produces the often unnoticed small, metal pieces that make up the core of many installations.
Reactor.foodProcessor_description: Uses agricultural products to produce edible consumables.
Reactor.glassFurnace_description: Creates different glasses and other sturdy materials at very high temperatures.
Reactor.habitationBarracks_description: Offers housing for 75 pioneers and 75 settlers.
Reactor.habitationCommune_description: Offers housing for 75 settlers and 75 technicians.
Reactor.habitationLuxury_description: Offers housing for 75 engineers and 75 scientists.
Reactor.habitationManagers_description: Offers housing for 75 technicians and 75 engineers.
Reactor.hullWeldingPlant_description: Creates a variety of ship hull plates and shields.
Reactor.hydroponicsFarm_description: Produces agricultural products like hydrocarbon plants. Does not need fertile soil but lots of water.
Reactor.inVitroPlant_description: Deals with the creation of artificial life and meat products.
Reactor.incinerator_description: Turns organically grown plants into life's most basic resource, Carbon.
Reactor.laboratory_description: Advanced laboratory that deals in more complex chemical reactions.
Reactor.mediumComponentsAssembly_description: Assembles technical pieces into larger parts, ready to be used in many devices.
Reactor.orchard_description: A specialized farm that produces high-maintenance fruits for high-end consumables.
Reactor.packagingCenter_description: Turns out bundles of items are more efficient to move around in space than individual items!
Reactor.pharmaFactory_description: A versatile factory equipped to produce medication as well as curative support products.
Reactor.planetaryProjectAdminCenter_description: The Administration Center allows to hold elections for a planetary governor. The governor can set taxes and fees like a production fee for example. Every site owner has the right to vote, but votes can also be acquired by completing tasks set up by the Exodus Council.
Reactor.planetaryProjectCogc_description: Allows for the communal implementation of industrial support programs.
Reactor.planetaryProjectComfortBig_description: Provides a large amount of comfort.
Reactor.planetaryProjectComfortCulture_descripti: Provides a small amount of comfort and culture.
Reactor.planetaryProjectComfortSmall_description: Provides a small amount of comfort.
Reactor.planetaryProjectCultureBig_description: Provides a large amount of culture.
Reactor.planetaryProjectCultureEducation_descrip: Provides a small amount of culture and education.
Reactor.planetaryProjectCultureSmall_description: Provides a small amount of culture.
Reactor.planetaryProjectEducationBig_description: Provides a large amount of education.
Reactor.planetaryProjectEducationSmall_descripti: Provides a small amount of education.
Reactor.planetaryProjectHealthBig_description: Provides a large amount of health.
Reactor.planetaryProjectHealthComfort_descriptio: Provides a small amount of health and comfort.
Reactor.planetaryProjectHealthSmall_description: Provides a small amount of health.
Reactor.planetaryProjectLocalMarket_description: A simple, unregulated, bulletin board style market place.
Reactor.planetaryProjectPopulation_description: This planetary project is a collection of all infrastructure projects that are relevant for the local population
Reactor.planetaryProjectSafetyBig_description: Provides a large amount of safety.
Reactor.planetaryProjectSafetyHealth_description: Provides a small amount of safety and health.
Reactor.planetaryProjectSafetySmall_description: Provides a small amount of safety.
Reactor.planetaryProjectShipyard_description: Bring your blueprints and materials here to build new ships.
Reactor.planetaryProjectWarehouse_description: Offers storage space for rent without the need to own a local site.
Reactor.plasticsPrinterFacility_description: Prints objects out of plastic pellets.
Reactor.polymerPlant_description: Chemical plant that turns basic elements into flexible polymers, used in all stages of technology.
Reactor.prefabPlant1_description: Produces basic prefabs necessary to construct buildings.
Reactor.prefabPlant2_description: Produces lightweight prefabs necessary to construct buildings.
Reactor.prefabPlant3_description: Produces reinforced prefabs necessary to construct buildings.
Reactor.prefabPlant4_description: Produces advanced prefabs necessary to construct buildings.
Reactor.refinery_description: Produces fuels used for space flight.
Reactor.shipKitFactory_description: A factory where all kinds of standardized cargo bay and fuel tank kits are put together.
Reactor.smallComponentsAssembly_description: Assembles technical pieces into smaller parts, ready to be used in many devices.
Reactor.softwareDevelopment_description: Here basic software components are being developed for use in more complex tools and systems.
Reactor.softwareEngineering_description: Basic software components are combined into tools that can be applied in a variety of devices or used as parts of more complex systems.
Reactor.softwareLabs_description: Architects form more advanced software applications from basic algorithms and tools for use in high-end devices.
Reactor.spacecraftPrefabPlant_description: A creation facility for all kinds of kits and standardized spaceship components.
Reactor.spacecraftPropulsionFactory_description: Produces anything necessary to move a spaceship, i.e. all kinds of STL engines and FTL reactors.
Reactor.storageBig_description: A large-scale storage facility that increases the capacity by 10000t / 10000m³.
Reactor.storageSmall_description: A small-scale storage facility that increases the capacity by 2500t / 2500m³.
Reactor.storageVolume_description: A volume-specialized form of storage that increases the capacity by 2500t / 7500m³.
Reactor.storageWeight_description: A weight-specialized form of storage that increases the capacity by 7500t / 2500m³.
Reactor.technetiumProcessing_description: Processes basic Technetium into a more stable configuration of the element.
Reactor.unitPrefabPlant_description: Produces building units ready to be used as parts of bigger construction projects.
Reactor.weavingPlant_description: Creates the most basic fabrics from fibers.
Reactor.weldingPlant_description: Creates a diverse set of metal products used in construction and device manufacturing.
